title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
summary: Google Lyria teaser

title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
summary: Sizzle video showing new capabilities from Lyria 3 Pro

title: Vibe Coding XR: Accelerating AI + XR prototyping with XR Blocks and Gemini
summary: Human-Computer Interaction and Visualization

title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Stability AI and NVIDIA Bring Faster Performance and Simplified Enterprise Deployment with the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM
summary: We're excited to announce our collaboration with NVIDIA to launch the Stable Diffusion 3.5 NIM microservice, enabling significant performance improvements and streamlined enterprise deployment for our leading image generation models.

title: Stride and prejudice: How a 32-bit overflow corrupted a CUDA kernel (and stayed hidden for weeks)
Plan, divide, and conquer: How weak models excel at long context tasks
summary: As context windows grow, LLM performance degrades in unexpected ways. We show how a "Divide & Conquer" framework — breaking long documents into parallel chunks with a planner, workers, and manager — lets smaller models like Llama-3-70B and Qwen-72B outperform GPT-4o single-shot.

title: AWS and Cerebras Collaboration Sets a New Standard for AI Inference Speed and Performance in the Cloud >
summary: Products

title: DeepSeek-R1 Release
Thinking Mode
introducing DeepSeek-V3
Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: Both deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner have been upgraded to DeepSeek-V3.2.

title: AutoClaw launch
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoClaw, a product positioned to install an AI agent on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as a new native product for agent-based computer use.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-5-Turbo, a base model optimized for agent scenarios with stronger tool use and long-horizon execution. The company positions it as part of its next-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 flagship model release
summary: Zhipu AI released GLM-5 as a new flagship foundation model for agent engineering, highlighting open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also claims strong benchmark results including SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0.

title: GLM-4.6V open-source vision reasoning model
summary: Zhipu AI announced GLM-4.6V, an open-source visual reasoning model described as delivering standout performance at the 100B-class level. It also supports tool calling and 128K context for automated task completion.

title: AutoGLM agent model
summary: Zhipu AI introduced AutoGLM, an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. The company says it addresses task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while enabling continual self-improvement.

title: 2025 annual results announcement schedule
summary: Zhipu AI announced that it will publish its full-year 2025 annual results on March 31, 2026. The notice identifies the company as listed in Hong Kong under stock code 02513.HK.

title: First performance report published
summary: Zhipu AI published its first performance report, framed as an exploration of the upper bounds of AGI intelligence. This is presented in the site's latest news section as a corporate milestone.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as GLM-PC base model
summary: Zhipu AI open-sourced CogAgent-9B, the foundation model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader large-model agent ecosystem. The company says the model was trained from GLM-4V-9B and is specialized for agent tasks using screenshots as input.

title: MiniMax M2.7
MiniMax M2.5

ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment Opens
summary: ByteDance Seed announced that its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program is now open, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment announcement for foundation model talent.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Released on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the release of Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview on Arena. The post indicates a preview model launch and public availability in the Arena environment.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. This marks a major model release in the company's model lineup.

title: Seedream 5.0 Lite Introduced
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, highlighting deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The announcement presents it as a new model release.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The announcement signals a new version release for the Seedance model family.

title: Seed Prover 1.5 Announced
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, describing it as an advanced mathematical reasoning model built on a novel agentic architecture. The release emphasizes improved reasoning capabilities for math-focused tasks.

title: Seed1.8 Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seed1.8, described as a generalized agentic model. The announcement positions it as a new model milestone in the Seed series.

title: Seedance 1.5 Pro Official Release
summary: ByteDance Seed officially released Seedance 1.5 Pro, promoted with the message 'Sound and Vision, All in One Take.' The launch suggests enhanced multimodal capabilities in the Seedance line.

title: Baichuan-M3-Plus launched as an evidence-grounded medical model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M3-Plus, a new medical large model focused on minimizing hallucinations with evidence grounding. The company claims a benchmark hallucination rate as low as 2.6% and says usage cost is reduced by 70% versus the previous generation.

title: "Hai Na Bai Chuan" program offers free Baichuan-M3-Plus API for healthcare service providers
summary: Baichuan AI launched the "Hai Na Bai Chuan" initiative to provide free Baichuan-M3-Plus API access to organizations serving medical professionals. The program is positioned to help partners deploy safer, evidence-enhanced medical AI in clinical decision support and medical education scenarios.

title: Baichuan4-Turbo released for enterprise scenarios
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan4-Turbo as a newly released model optimized for high-frequency enterprise use cases. It claims 10%+ better usability than Baichuan4, lower deployment and inference costs, and significantly faster first-token and token streaming speed.

title: Baichuan4-Air released with MoE architecture
summary: Baichuan AI launched Baichuan4-Air, a newly released MoE model featuring the company's PRI architecture and enterprise-focused optimization. The company highlights very low inference cost and strong performance with improved timeliness compared with mainstream international MoE models.

title: Baichuan-M3 open-sourced as a commercially usable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI released Baichuan-M3 as an open-source, commercially usable medical model with strong reasoning and low hallucination characteristics. The company describes it as a 235B-parameter model with leading open HealthBench performance and full consultation capability.

title: Baichuan-M2 open-sourced as a deployable medical reasoning model
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan-M2 as an open-source, commercially usable medical reasoning model that can be deployed on a single RTX 4090 GPU. It is presented as a 32B-parameter model with 32K context and top open HealthBench results.

title: Baichuan-M1 released as the first medical-enhanced model
summary: Baichuan AI introduced Baichuan-M1 as its first medical-enhanced model and made it open-source for commercial use. The model is described as a 14B-parameter system trained with 20T of medical-enhanced corpus and supporting 32K context.

title: Baichuan2-13B released with major capability gains over prior generation
summary: Baichuan AI announced Baichuan2-13B as an open-source, commercially usable multilingual model. The company says it improves over the previous 13B generation by 49% in math, 46% in coding, 37% in safety, 25% in logical reasoning, and 15% in semantic understanding.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major platform milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical deployment and outcomes.

title: 01.AI's LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation of the company's enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted as global SOTA
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as an open-source Mixture-of-Experts large language model and described it as global state of the art. The item signals a notable model announcement within the company's Yi foundation model lineup.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets with 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI reported a meeting between Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev and CEO Kai-Fu Lee. The event is a notable company news item indicating high-level international engagement.

2025-07-31 StepMesh: A Communication Library for Attention-FFN Disaggregation This article delves into the technical details and design choices of StepMesh, sharing our insights and considerations regarding the communication requirements for AF Separation systems.
2025-07-24 Step-Audio 2: Breakthrough in End-to-End Speech Modeling Technology Step-Audio 2 is an end-to-end multimodal large language model engineered for industrial applications

2025-05-30 Discrete Distribution Networks：A Novel Generative Model with Simple Principles and Unique Properties Discrete Distribution Networks (DDN) is a novel generative model that adopts a simple yet fundamentally different approach to mainstream generative models for modeling target distributions.

2025-05-30 Open-Reasoner-Zero: An Open Source Approach to Scaling Up Reinforcement Learning on the Base Model In this blog, we introduce Open-Reasoner-Zero, the first open source implementation of large-scale reasoning-oriented RL training on the base model focusing on scalability, simplicity and accessibility.
